args.title: Local RAG Coder
args.css:
body, html, .stuard-root, #stuard-root { margin: 0; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; }
.stuard-root { background: #0f172a !important; }

args.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS code_index (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, path TEXT, content TEXT, vector_json TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO code_index (id, path, content, vector_json) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT id, path, content, vector_json FROM code_index
